message:
Extend diagnostic, webhook, workflow, and CLI functionality

- diagnostic.rs, event_templates.rs, export.rs, suggestions.rs, workflows.rs:
  Add module-level documentation and minor consistency improvements
- output/renderers.rs: Add renderer documentation
- webhook.rs: Extend webhook handling with retry logic and timeout config
- main.rs: Refactor CLI argument handling, improve error messages

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
